product_overview: CureConnect is an AI-driven healthcare navigator that helps users analyze symptoms (local + n8n AI), discover specialists, book appointments, and access emergency first-aid guidance through a single REST API-backed platform.
core_goals: Provide fast, reliable symptom triage combining local rule-based analysis with an optional n8n AI agent
Enable simple discovery of verified specialist doctors with filterable search
Support frictionless appointment booking with conflict detection and asynchronous automation notifications
Deliver concise, actionable first-aid guides accessible without login
Maintain a personal health hub (profile, history, appointments) secured by JWT
Gracefully degrade when external services (n8n, Supabase) are unavailable

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Register new users, authenticate via email/password, and retrieve the currently authenticated user's profile (JWT-based).
user_flows: POST /api/auth/register with {name,email,password,phone?,age?,blood_group?} -> Receive 201 with user id and JWT token (auto-login) -> GET /api/auth/me with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with user profile (name,email,phone,age,blood_group)
POST /api/auth/login with {email,password} -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/auth/me with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with profile
POST /api/auth/register with an email that already exists -> Receive 409 Duplicate email error
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 invalid credentials -> GET /api/auth/me without Authorization header -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Symptom Analysis
features.description: Analyze user symptoms via a local rule-based engine and optionally enrich results through the n8n AI webhook; persist check results and provide history for authenticated users.
user_flows: POST /api/symptoms/check with {symptoms: [...], prompt?: string} and optional Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with local analysis (risk level, matched conditions) and n8n recommendations when available (n8n_sent:true, recommendations: [...]) -> GET /api/symptoms/history with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with recent symptom_checks including the saved analysis

POST /api/symptoms/check with {symptoms: [...]} (no token) -> Receive 200 with local analysis and n8n_sent:false when n8n webhook times out or fails (fallback to local results) -> (optional) GET /api/symptoms/history without token -> Receive 401 unauthorized (history requires JWT)

features.name: Doctors Directory
features.description: Browse and filter verified doctors by specialty and city, and retrieve detailed doctor profiles.
user_flows: GET /api/doctors?specialty=Cardiologist&city=Mumbai -> Receive 200 with list of doctors ordered by rating (partial matches supported) -> GET /api/doctors/:id with selected doctor id -> Receive 200 with detailed doctor profile (name,specialty,hospital,phone,rating,available_days)
GET /api/doctors?specialty=NonExistentSpecialty -> Receive 200 with empty list (or curated fallback list returned when Supabase is unavailable)

features.name: Appointment Management
features.description: Create, list and cancel appointments. Booking enforces slot conflict checks and fires an n8n webhook asynchronously (fire-and-forget).
user_flows: POST /api/appointments with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and {doctor_id,date,time,reason?,notes?} -> Receive 201 with appointment id and status: pending (server triggers n8n webhook asynchronously) -> GET /api/appointments/my with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with the user's appointments (appointment shows status pending and n8n_sent flag)
POST /api/appointments with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> using a doctor_id + date + time that already exists and status != cancelled -> Receive 409 slot conflict error (duplicate booking prevented)

PUT /api/appointments/:id/cancel with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with appointment status updated to cancelled -> GET /api/appointments/my with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 showing appointment status cancelled

POST /api/appointments with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 201 booking created but n8n webhook fails externally (n8n unavailable) -> Server returns confirmation; appointment n8n_sent:false (system degrades gracefully)

features.name: Emergency First Aid
features.description: Provide quick, step-by-step first aid guides for critical and moderate conditions accessible without authentication.
user_flows: GET /api/firstaid -> Receive 200 with list of first-aid conditions (heart-attack,choking,stroke,anaphylaxis,burns,fracture) -> GET /api/firstaid/heart-attack -> Receive 200 with numbered step-by-step instructions, CRITICAL warnings, and emergency action guidance
GET /api/firstaid/unknown-condition -> Receive 404 not found (or built-in fallback guide returned when database table is unavailable)

features.name: Profile & Medical ID
features.description: Expose the user's profile and persistent medical identity (medical ID, allergies, chronic conditions) to authenticated clients.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with {email,password} -> Receive 200 with JWT -> GET /api/auth/me with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with profile including patient_id (UUID), blood_group, allergies and emergency contact
GET /api/auth/me with an expired or invalid Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: n8n Webhook Receiver
features.description: Receive automation events from n8n (appointment reminders, AI results) and acknowledge processing back to the automation layer.
user_flows: POST /api/webhook/n8n with valid event payload (action: 'appointment' or 'symptom_checking') -> Receive 200 OK acknowledgement -> Server processes payload (e.g., mark appointment n8n_sent:true, store AI recommendations) and may update DB records
POST /api/webhook/n8n with malformed payload or missing required fields -> Receive 400 bad request indicating validation error

routes.description: User registration with name, email, password, and optional personal details
User login with email and password, returns JWT token
Analyze symptoms using local engine and optional n8n AI webhook
Get history of symptom checks for the authenticated user
List doctors with optional specialty and city filters
Get detailed profile of a specific doctor
Book a new medical appointment and trigger n8n notification
Get list of appointments for the authenticated user
Get detailed first aid instructions for a specific condition

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Complete flow for registration, login, and profile retrieval

features.name: Symptom Analysis
features.description: Multi-stage symptom analysis combining local logic and AI webhooks

features.name: Appointment Management
features.description: Search for doctors and manage medical appointments

features.name: Emergency First Aid
features.description: Access life-saving first aid instructions and guides

known_limitations.issue: n8n webhook is external and may timeout or fail
known_limitations.impact: System falls back to local analysis or records booking without notification if n8n is unavailable

known_limitations.issue: Fixed set of time slots for appointments
known_limitations.impact: Simplified scheduling logic for demonstration purposes
